headlines.description: Atletico Madrid were held to a 1-1 draw at Lokomotiv Moscow in their Champions League Group A match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico frustrated by Lokomotiv

headlines.description: Striker Alassane Plea scored a hat-trick as Borussia Moenchengladbach crushed their hosts Schakhtar Donetsk 6-0 on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Plea leads rout as Gladbach crush Shakthar

headlines.description: Diogo Jota scored a hat-trick as Liverpool breezed past hosts Atalanta 5-0 in Champions League group-stage action on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jota hat trick leads Liverpool past Atalanta

headlines.description: Ajax Amsterdam scored after 47 seconds to beat Denmark's Midtjylland 2-1 away on Tuesday for their first Champions League group stage win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax score early in away win over Midtjylland

headlines.description: Porto beat Marseille 3-0 in Group C on Tuesday, inflicting a record 12th consecutive defeat in the Champions League on the French club.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marseille suffer record UCL loss, on brink of exit

headlines.description: Manchester City continued their perfect start to the Champions League campaign as they toiled to a 3-0 home win against Olympiakos.
headlines.shortLinkText: City continue perfect start in Champions League

headlines.description: Bayern Munich came from behind to crush RB Salzburg 6-2 with two goals from Robert Lewandowski.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern cruise to 6-2 win against Salzburg

headlines.description: Real Madrid squandered a two-goal lead but fought back to claim a 3-2 victory over Inter Milan in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodrygo rescues Real after losing 2-goal lead

headlines.description: Manchester United were stunned 2-1 at Basaksehir in their Champions League Group H match on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United suffer surprising loss at Basaksehir

headlines.description: Felipe Caicedo produced another of his familiar late strikes to give Lazio a 1-1 draw at Zenit St. Petersburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Another Caicedo late show gives depleted Lazio point at Zenit

headlines.description: Lionel Messi's early penalty and Gerard Pique's second-half header saw a less than convincing Barcelona salvage a 2-1 win over Dynamo Kiev.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Ter Stegen help Barca fend off Dynamo

headlines.description: Chelsea continued their strong start in the Champions League with a 3-0 win against Rennes in a game marred by VAR controversy at Stamford Bridge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea beat Rennes amid VAR dispute

headlines.description: In-form Erling Haaland scored twice as Borussia Dortmund surged to the top of their Champions League group with a 3-0 win over Club Brugge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland too hot for Brugge as Dortmund go top

headlines.description: Alvaro Morata scored twice before two defensive mistakes helped Juventus to a 4-1 Champions League win at Ferencvaros on Wednesday as they bounced b
headlines.shortLinkText: Morata helps Juve cruise to 4-1 win in UCL

headlines.description: RB Leipzig came from behind to beat Paris St Germain 2-1 at home in a pulsating Champions League Group H clash on Wednesday
headlines.shortLinkText: RB Leipzig comeback to beat nine-man PSG

headlines.description: Sevilla came back from two goals down to pull off a heroic 3-2 win at home to Krasnodar in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla overcome two-goal deficit Krasnodar

headlines.description: Sevilla reached the UCL knockout stages with two games to spare after a stoppage-time goal by Munir El Haddadi snatched a 2-1 win at Krasnodar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla reach Champions League last 16 with win at Krasnodar

headlines.description: Chelsea qualified for the Champions League round of 16 with a dramatic 2-1 victory at Rennes on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Giroud header puts Chelsea in round of 16

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund forward Erling Haaland scored twice as they cruised to a 3-0 win over Club Brugge on Tuesday to top Group F.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland double hands Dortmund win over Brugge

headlines.description: Sergino Dest became the first U.S. international to score for Barcelona in their 4-0 Champions League win over Dynamo Kiev on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona win as Dest scores historic U.S. goal

headlines.description: Juventus progressed to the Champions League last 16 after goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Alvaro Morata gave them a 2-1 win over Ferencvaros.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo fires Juve into Champions League last 16

headlines.description: Lazio forward Ciro Immobile struck twice and Marco Parolo scored his first Champions League goal aged 35 as they beat Zenit St Petersburg 3-1.
headlines.shortLinkText: Immobile double helps Lazio move closer to knockout stage

headlines.description: Man United cruised to victory in the UCL against Istanbul Basaksehir, with Fernandes scoring two, with Rashford and James all on the score sheet.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fernandes, Rashford net in Man United UCL win

headlines.description: Paris Saint Germain revived their hopes of reaching the Champions League knockout phase with a 1-0 win over RB Leizpig.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG revive Champions League chances with Neymar penalty

headlines.description: Borussia Monchengladbach cruised past Shakhtar Donetsk 4-0 on Wednesday to stay top of Champions League Group B.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gladbach crush Shakhtar to stay top of Group B

headlines.description: — Phil Foden sent Pep Guardiola another reminder of his scoring ability by earning Manchester City a 1-0 win at Olympiakos on Wednesday, clinching the English team a place in the knockout stage of the Champions League for an eighth straight season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City advances in Champions League after Foden's winner

headlines.description: Ajax Amsterdam spurned a series of chances in the first half but scored quickly at the start of the second to beat Midtjylland of Denmark 3-1.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax beat Midtjylland to stay second in UCL group

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid huffed and puffed against Lokomotiv Moscow but had to a settle for a disappointing 0-0 draw at home in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico held to frustrating home draw with Lokomotiv

headlines.description: Holders Bayern Munich failed to hit top form but did enough for a win over visitors Salzburg to book their spot in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern reach UCL knockouts after Salzburg win

headlines.description: Eden Hazard scored his first Champions League goal in three years as Real Madrid beat Internazionale 2-0 to go second in Group B.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hazard strikes as Real pick up big win vs. Inter

headlines.description: Atalanta defeated Liverpool at Anfield to boost their hopes of qualifying for the knockout stages of the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta repay Liverpool with win at Anfield

headlines.description: Porto comfortably beat Olympique de Marseille 2-0 away on Wednesday to move to the brink of qualifying for the Champions League knockout phase.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto see off sorry Marseille to close in on last 16

headlines.description: A first-half brace by Mergim Berisha helped earn Salzburg a 3-1 win at Lokomotiv Moscow in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Berisha double fires Salzburg to 3-1 win over Lokomotiv

headlines.description: Real Madrid complicated their hopes of qualifying for the Champions League knockout stage after falling 2-0 at Shakhtar Donetsk.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid on brink after second Shakhtar stunner

headlines.description: Cristian Romero's late equaliser secured a potentially precious point for Atalanta in a hard-fought 1-1 draw with Danish side Midtjylland.
headlines.shortLinkText: Romero claims precious point for Atalanta in Midtjylland draw

headlines.description: Thomas Muller's late penalty salvaged a 1-1 draw for Bayern Munich against Atletico Madrid in Champions League group stage action on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern's late pen delays Atleti's last-16 plans

headlines.description: Inter Milan forward Romelu Lukaku scored twice in the second half to steer them to a 3-2 win at Borussia Moenchengladbach on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lukaku brace keeps Inter's UCL hopes alive

headlines.description: — Porto advanced to the knockout stage of the Champions League with a 0-0 draw against already-qualified Manchester City, whose point assured the English team a first-place finish in Group C on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto advances in CL, Man City tops group after 0-0 draw

headlines.description: Liverpool secured their place in the Champions League round of 16 with a 1-0 win against Ajax at Anfield on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool win to reach UCL knockout stages

headlines.description: Olympiakos were eliminated from the Champions League when they slumped to a 2-1 defeat at Olympique de Marseille in Group C on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Olympiakos eliminated from Champions League

headlines.description: RB Leipzig squandered a two-goal lead before Alexander Sorloth's stoppage-time goal earned them a 4-3 victory at Istanbul Basaksehir.
headlines.shortLinkText: RB Leipzig snatch late win with Sorloth strike

headlines.description: Krasnodar striker Marcus Berg scored in the second half to seal a 1-0 Champions League win over Rennes on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Krasnodar beat Rennes to seal Europa League spot

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund overcame the absence of injured top scorer Erling Haaland to draw 1-1 with Lazio in Champions League Group F on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund draw with Lazio without Haaland to reach last-16

name: Zenit St Petersburg at Club Brugge

headlines.description: Belgium's Club Brugge kept alive their hopes of advancing in the Champions League when a convincing 3-0 home win over Zenit St Petersburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Club Brugge keep up hopes of Champions League progress

headlines.description: The win books Barca's spot in the round of 16 with one match remaining in group play -- next week's blockbuster clash against Juventus.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca cruise to UCL win ahead of Juventus bout

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his 750th career goal as Stephanie Frappart became the first female referee to take charge of a Champions League match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve UCL win sees Ronaldo's 750th goal, first female ref

headlines.description: Manchester United will have to wait until their final group game to qualify for the Champions League knockout stages after losing 3-1 to PSG.
headlines.shortLinkText: Neymar, PSG dent Man Utd's qualifying hopes

headlines.description: Olivier Giroud scored four goals as Chelsea beat Sevilla 4-0 to secure top spot in Champions League Group E on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giroud scores four in Chelsea thrashing of Sevilla

headlines.description: Lazio sneaked into the Champions League knockout stage for the first time in over 20 years on Tuesday despite being held to a 2-2 draw at home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lazio sneak into last 16 after nail-biting finale

name: Borussia Dortmund at Zenit St Petersburg

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund struck twice in the space of 11 second-half minutes to seal a 2-1 victory at Zenit St Petersburg in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund win Group F with comeback win at Zenit

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice and Weston McKennie added another as Juventus beat Barcelona in a much-anticipated Group G finale on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo, McKennie fuel Juve past Messi's Barca

headlines.description: — A second-string Chelsea side was held 1-1 at home by Krasnodar in the Champions League on Tuesday, in a match where there was little at stake.
headlines.shortLinkText: Group winner Chelsea draws 1-1 against Krasnodar

headlines.description: RB Leipzig sent Manchester United packing from the Champions League with a huge win that sees them into the knockout rounds from Group H.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig eliminate Man Utd from UCL in shock win

headlines.description: Atalanta beat Ajax 1-0 at the Johan Cruyff Arena to claim second place in Group D and progress to the Champions League round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta beat Ajax to reach UCL round of 16

headlines.description: — Liverpool failed to build on its quickest ever goal in the Champions League, drawing 1-1 at tournament newcomer FC Midtjylland in their final group game on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool scores its quickest CL goal in 1-1 at Midtjylland

headlines.description: Neymar scored a hat trick as Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 5-1 victory over Istanbul Basaksehir in the teams' re-started Champions League match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Neymar hits hat trick after PSG-Basaksehir resumes

headlines.description: Bayern Munich earned a 2-0 victory over Lokomotiv Moscow in their final Champions League Group A game on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern cruise past Lokomotiv in UCL

headlines.description: Inter Milan were knocked out of the Champions League in the group stage for the third season in a row on Wednesday after being held to a 0-0 draw at
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter suffer third straight UCL group stage exit

headlines.description: Sergio Aguero came off the bench to score for Manchester City as they cruised past Olympique Marseille 3-0 in Champions League Group C on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aguero on target as Man City sink Marseille

headlines.description: An opportunist goal by defender Mario Hermoso and a sweet Yannick Carrasco strike gave Atletico Madrid a 2-0 win at FC Salzburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico Madrid sink Salzburg to reach UCL last 16

headlines.description: Real Madrid sealed qualification to the Champions League round of 16 with a 2-0 victory over Borussia Monchengladbach on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benzema double sees Madrid sneak through

headlines.description: — Kylian Mbappé scored a hat trick as Paris Saint-Germain came from behind to rout Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the round of 16 of the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé's hat trick gives PSG 4-1 win over Barcelona in CL

headlines.description: — Mohamed Salah and Sadio Mane pounced on defensive mistakes to score Liverpool’s goals in a 2-0 win over Leipzig in the Champions League on Tuesday, giving the six-time European champions some respite amid an alarming slump in form domestically.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool gets respite with 2-0 win over Leipzig in CL

headlines.description: — Porto scored at the start of each half to beat Juventus 2-1 in the first leg of the round of 16 of the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fast start sees Porto stun Juventus 2-1 in Champions League

headlines.description: Erling Haaland scored twice as Borussia Dortmund overcame an early deficit to beat Sevilla in their Champions League last-16 first leg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland's classy brace fuels Dortmund comeback

headlines.description: An outrageous overhead goal from Olivier Giroud handed Chelsea victory over Atletico Madrid in their Champions League round of 16 first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea beat Atleti with spectacular Giroud strike

headlines.description: — Jamal Musiala became Bayern Munich’s youngest-ever goalscorer in the Champions League as he helped his team rout Lazio 4-1 in the first leg of the round of 16 on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Musiala Bayern's youngest-ever CL scorer in 4-1 win at Lazio

headlines.description: — Real Madrid struggled to break down 10-man Atalanta before Ferland Mendy netted an 86th-minute winner to give the Spanish giant a 1-0 win in the first leg of the round of 16 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mendy's late goal gives Madrid 1-0 win over 10-man Atalanta

headlines.description: Manchester City extended their winning run to 19 games as they beat Borussia Monchengladbach 2-0 in the Champions League round of 16 first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: City outclass Gladbach in dominant display

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 5-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 5-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: — Erling Haaland scored twice for Borussia Dortmund to reach the Champions League quarterfinals in a heated 2-2 draw with Sevilla on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland stars again as Dortmund reaches CL quarterfinals

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - FC Porto win on away goals
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - FC Porto win on away goals

headlines.description: — Sérgio Oliveira scored in extra time to send 10-man Porto into the quarterfinals of the Champions League despite a thrilling 3-2 loss at Juventus on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto into CL quarterfinals despite 3-2 loss at Juventus

headlines.description: — With its Premier League title defense in tatters, Liverpool kept its last chance of a trophy alive by beating Leipzig 2-0 Wednesday to reach the Champions League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool beats Leipzig to reach Champions League quarters

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 5-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 5-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: PSG survived an upset-minded Barcelona to reach the Champions League quarterfinals, 5-2 on aggregate, after a 1-1 draw in their second leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi misses penalty as PSG advance to last 8

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 4-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 4-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Manchester City outclassed Borussia Monchengladbach to win 2-0 on Tuesday and book their place in the Champions League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City stroll into UCL quarterfinals

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 4-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 4-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: — Real Madrid defeated Atalanta 3-1 on Tuesday to return to the Champions League quarterfinals after two consecutive eliminations in the last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beats Atalanta to return to CL quarterfinals

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 6-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 6-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: — Bayern Munich moved a step closer to defending its Champions League title by beating Lazio 2-1 at home Wednesday to seal a 6-2 aggregate win and a place in the quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern beats Lazio for Champions League quarterfinal spot

headlines.description: Chelsea reached the quarterfinals of the Champions League, 3-0 on aggregate, after a 2-0 second-leg win over 10-man Atletico Madrid on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea see off Atletico to reach UCL quarters

headlines.description: — Phil Foden capped a fine Champions League display for Manchester City with a 90th-minute goal to secure a 2-1 win over Borussia Dortmund in the first leg of their quarterfinal on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Foden gives Man City 2-1 Champions League win over Dortmund

headlines.description: — Vinícius Júnior scored a goal in each half as Real Madrid defeated Liverpool 3-1 in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid beats Liverpool 3-1 in 1st leg of CL quarterfinals

headlines.description: — Kylian Mbappé scored twice to lead Paris Saint-Germain to a 3-2 win at defending champion Bayern Munich in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé stars as PSG beats Bayern 3-2 in CL quarterfinal

headlines.description: Chelsea scored two away goals in a win over Porto to take a decisive upper hand in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea down Porto with pair of big away goals

headlines.description: Chelsea sneaked into the Champions League semifinals despite a 1-0 defeat against FC Porto in Seville on Tuesday,with a 2-1 victory on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea sneak into UCL semifinals with loss

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Paris Saint-Germain win on away goals
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Paris Saint-Germain win on away goals

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain reached the semifinals of the Champions League on away goals despite a 1-0 loss to defending champs Bayern Munich.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG hold off Bayern Munich to reach UCL semis

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 4-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 4-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: — Pep Guardiola shared an emotional moment with goalscorer Phil Foden as Manchester City ended its run of failure in the Champions League quarterfinals Wednesday, beating Borussia Dortmund 2-1 for a 4-2 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City beats Dortmund for Champions League semifinal

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Real Madrid knocked out Liverpool to reach the Champions League semifinals following a 0-0 draw at Anfield on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid eliminate Liverpool with draw at Anfield

headlines.description: Christian Pulisic scored for Chelsea as they earned a creditable 1-1 draw against Real Madrid in their Champions League semifinal first-leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic makes history in Chelsea, Madrid draw

headlines.description: Manchester City fought back from a goal down to beat PSG 2-1 in their Champions League semifinal first leg at the Parc des Princes on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City rally to first-leg UCL win at PSG

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 4-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 4-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Two Riyad Mahrez goals sent Manchester City to their first-ever Champions League final as beat Paris Saint-Germain 2-0 at a snowy Etihad Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahrez goals send Man City to first UCL final

headlines.description: Chelsea reached their first Champions League final since 2012 as goals from Timo Werner and Mason Mount secured a 2-0 victory over Real Madrid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Werner, Mount goals set up all-English UCL final

headlines.description: — Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola selected a team without either of his holding midfielders, Rodri or Fernandinho, for the Champions League final against Chelsea on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: CL final: Man City leaves out Rodri, Fernandinho vs Chelsea
